main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'daño mecanico... compactacion/delaminacion por choque osmotico' wrong diagnosis

key_signals.justification: C2: 4 signals (P 16.8, rechazo 85.3, cond 850, ORP neg + sulfito)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (biofouling, scaling) ambos descartados correctamente

recommended_action.justification: C4: stop + low-P 3-4 bar flush con permeado 2h - matches gold sin CIP

requested_data.justification: C5: 1 anchor (paso de sales por elemento)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'si tras flush retornan a baseline... ' sin trigger numerico

reviewer_notes: Diagnostico erroneo aunque action correcta sin CIP
